sql_array: CREATE TABLE test.hits (ClientIP UInt32, EventDate Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY EventDate;
SELECT IPv4NumToStringClassC(ClientIP) AS ip_class_c, COUNT() AS count FROM test.hits WHERE ClientIP IS NULL GROUP BY ip_class_c HAVING COUNT() > 0 ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT a.ip_class_c, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT IPv4NumToStringClassC(ClientIP) AS ip_class_c FROM test.hits) AS a WHERE a.ip_class_c IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a.ip_class_c HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT IPv4NumToStringClassC(ClientIP) AS ip_class_c FROM test.hits WHERE ClientIP IS NOT NULL AND EventDate = toDate('2023-10-02') ORDER BY ip_class_c;
SELECT IPv4NumToStringClassC(ClientIP) AS ip_class_c, SUM(CASE WHEN ClientIP IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_count FROM test.hits GROUP BY ip_class_c;
CREATE TABLE test.joined_data (ClientIP UInt32, EventDate Date, UserID UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY EventDate;

SELECT j.ip_class_c, COUNT() FROM (SELECT IPv4NumToStringClassC(ClientIP) AS ip_class_c FROM test.hits) AS h JOIN (SELECT IPv4NumToStringClassC(ClientIP) AS j_ip_class_c FROM test.joined_data WHERE UserID IS NOT NULL) AS j ON h.ip_class_c = j.j_ip_class_c GROUP BY j.ip_class_c;
SELECT COUNT() FROM (SELECT DISTINCT IPv4NumToStringClassC(ClientIP) AS ip_class_c FROM test.hits) AS distinct_ips WHERE ip_class_c IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test.nullable_data (ClientIP Nullable(UInt32), EventDate Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY EventDate;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test.nullable_data WHERE ClientIP IS NULL;
SELECT IPv4NumToStringClassC(ClientIP) AS ip_class_c FROM test.nullable_data WHERE ClientIP IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ip_class_c DESC LIMIT 10;
CREATE TABLE test.extreme_cases (ClientIP UInt32, EventDate Date, Value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY EventDate;
SELECT DISTINCT IPv4NumToStringClassC(ClientIP) AS ip_class_c, COUNT(Value) FROM test.extreme_cases GROUP BY ip_class_c HAVING COUNT(Value) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(Value) DESC;
SELECT a.ip_class_c, COUNT() FROM (SELECT IPv4NumToStringClassC(ClientIP) AS ip_class_c FROM test.extreme_cases WHERE Value IS NOT NULL) AS a WHERE a.ip_class_c IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a.ip_class_c;
